name: walking-to-door
prompt: Medium shot from behind. Brunette woman walking toward door, her back to camera. Dark-haired man visible in background LEFT, watching. The distance growing. Cool blue room. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: the-door
prompt: Medium shot on door. Dark metal surface, cool corridor light at edges. The door closing, quiet and final. No drama, just ending. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: heavy metal door closing with solid thunk and latch click

name: idris-alone
prompt: Wide shot from door angle. Officers quarters interior, cool blue-white lighting. Dark-haired man standing alone CENTER-LEFT. Door closed behind camera. The room holding its breath. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: standing-in-absence
prompt: Medium shot. Dark-haired man standing where she left him. Isolated in frame, empty space around. Cool blue light. One fewer person in the room. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
